summary: Major B42 release — crafting overhaul, item system rewrite, mod structure changes

changes.description: B42 mods need either common/ or 42/ folder — this mod has neither
B42 mods need either 42/ or common/ folder — this mod has neither
mod.info should declare versionMin for B42 compatibility
ISInventoryPage removed — inventory UI completely rewritten in B42
changes.context: B42 replaced the entire inventory UI framework

changes.description: ISInventoryPane removed — part of B41 inventory UI
changes.context: B42 replaced the entire inventory UI framework
Inventory transfer actions are completely new in B42

changes.description: ISInventoryPaneContextMenu removed — inventory context menus rewritten in B42
changes.context: B42 replaced the entire inventory UI framework including context menus

changes.description: ISToolTipInv may be changed/removed in B42
changes.context: Tooltip system updated with new inventory

changes.description: ISCraftingUI removed — crafting system completely overhauled in B42
changes.context: B42 crafting system is entirely new

changes.description: Old recipe Lua API removed — B42 uses new crafting system
changes.context: Recipe system completely rewritten in B42

changes.description: B41 ModOptions implementation replaced with native ModOptions API
changes.context: B42 has a native ModOptions API — see https://pzwiki.net/wiki/ModOptions

changes.description: B42 replaced 'Type = Food' with 'ItemType = base:food' — old syntax may still load but is not guaranteed
changes.context: B42 game scripts use 'ItemType = base:food' and 'DisplayCategory = Food' — vanilla no longer uses 'Type = Food'

changes.description: Some LuaManager.GlobalObject methods deprecated in B42
changes.context: Check against B42 JavaDocs for current API
